title: Chewy Tangy German Beef Stir-fry with Chimichurri Sauce
description: A romantic German dish featuring tender poached beef paired with tangy chimichurri sauce for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Poach the beef in a small amount of water until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mince the onion and garlic finely.
Add minced onions and garlic to the pan with some vegetable oil or butter. Cook for about 5 minutes on medium heat.
Season the poached beef with salt and pepper.
Stir in chimichurri sauce (adjust according to taste).
Mix all ingredients together thoroughly, ensuring the beef is evenly coated.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
